NYC DSA

Tech Action

Working Group

If there is technological advance without social advance, there is, almost automatically, an increase in human misery, in impoverishment.

— Michael Harrington, The Other America, 1962

Have you ever wondered...

What is the role of labor in the tech industry?

How do data centers impact our communities?

What does class have to do with internet access?

How does Big Tech influence education, housing, and criminal justice policy?

How can I take control of the technology in my life instead of it controlling me?

Who's interests does AI serve?

🌹 💻 The NYC DSA Tech Action Working Group wants to help you find answers 💻 🌹
🌹 💻 The NYC DSA Tech Action Working Group wants to help you find answers 💻 🌹
🌹 💻 The NYC DSA Tech Action Working Group wants to help you find answers 💻 🌹

We're developing a socialist perspective on technology and society,

creating alternatives to the status quo,

and thinking up strategies to challenge the tech industry's growing power.

Testimony: Biometrics Bill

Thursday, March 05, 2026 By NYC DSA Tech Action OC

The NYCDSA Tech Action working group supports the passing of Int. 0213-2026 [1]. The following testimony was submitted on March 4th 2026 and preceded by an earlier version of presented at City Council on March 2nd 2026.

NYCDSA Tech Action is deeply concerned with the expansion of mass......
